mainEntity.text: How to measure ROI from Google AI Overviews for Houston immigration attorneys?

acceptedAnswer.text: Measure ROI by tracking branded queries, form fills from AI referrals, and citation frequency using tools like Semrush for Houston immigration leads.

suggestedAnswer.text: AI drives high-intent traffic; attribute via UTM or console data. Houston attorneys calculate cost-per-lead vs traditional SEO. Focus on conversion-optimized landing pages post-citation.
